subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, when I desire to make mention of Thee with the remembrance of the sanctified ones and praise Thee with glorification [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی حینئذ ارید ان اذکرک بذکر المقدسین و اسبحک بتسبیح
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
